# PHIL.016 ? Megaric School

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** ancient_greek_roman
**Subcategory:** megaric_school
**Domain:** ANCIENT_GREEK_ROMAN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Focus on logic and dialectic; paradoxes and puzzles; denial of potentiality; only actuality exists; logical rigor

## Application
Use logical analysis rigorously; explore paradoxes; focus on what is actual rather than potential; precise definitions and distinctions

## Key Values
- Logical precision
- Dialectical skill
- Actuality
- Paradox exploration
